pattern: @PreAuthorize with custom AuthorizationManager bean returning object instead of boolean always grants access; SpEL coerces object truthiness to true.
suggested_fix: Custom @PreAuthorize helpers must return boolean or callers must use .isGranted() on AuthorizationDecision. Use Spring 6+ PreAuthorizeAuthorizationManager pattern with type-safe return.

pattern: JPA entity field declared String while DB migration column is UUID (e.g., orgUnitId); compiles + passes Mockito tests but throws PSQLException on real filtered queries.
suggested_fix: Change entity field type to UUID; update mappers/DTOs that serialize the field. Review all migration scripts (V14–V22) to confirm DDL matches entity types. Run integration tests against real DB.

pattern: Mock-based test suite 100% green masks DB-type mismatches, missing migrations, persistence-wiring stubs. Zero integration tests leaves DDL validation + Flyway issues undetected.
suggested_fix: Require at least 1 DB-backed (H2/Testcontainers) slice test for entities with filtered queries + migrations. Verify @DataJpaTest or @SpringBootTest(webEnvironment=RANDOM_PORT) covers happy + error paths.

pattern: Dev wave marked Pass with stub services (ChangeHistoryService log-only), missing migrations, zero entity tests. QA/reviewer unaware of service stubs vs. real persistence.
suggested_fix: QA/reviewer checklist: verify migrations exist for all entities, @PreAuthorize on all approval endpoints, audit/history services actually INSERT (not log-only). Use Service Stub Pattern with explicit @TODO marker if intentional.

pattern: update() method double findById (load for history snapshot, then mutate) within same persistence context yields oldEntity==newEntity (same managed instance), diffs always empty.
suggested_fix: Snapshot field values BEFORE mutation: capture oldEntity.field1/field2/.../fieldN as strings/values in separate variables before calling entity.setField(). Use @Builder or explicit DTO copy of pre-state. Verify diff is non-empty before INSERT.
